title: OpenAI Launches Custom Workspace Agents for Teams
summary: OpenAI now allows Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plan users to create custom cloud-based agents in ChatGPT. These agents can automate tasks like gathering product feedback and sending reports.
body:
OpenAI has introduced customizable "workspace" agents for teams using its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans. These cloud-based agents, accessible within ChatGPT, can perform a variety of business tasks. Examples include an agent that scours the web for product feedback and sends a compiled report to Slack, and a sales agent that can handle customer inquiries and follow-ups.

This development marks a significant step in automating routine business processes. By enabling teams to create their own agents, OpenAI is positioning ChatGPT as a versatile tool for productivity and workflow management. The move also highlights the growing trend of AI-driven automation in the workplace, potentially changing how teams operate.

The reaction to this new feature has been largely positive, with businesses and educators expressing interest in the potential time-saving benefits. However, questions remain about the customization options available and the learning curve for creating these agents. OpenAI's ability to address these concerns will be crucial in determining the widespread adoption of this feature.
